name: Tourism Holdings Rentals Limited
analysis: THL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$2.1600, stop A$2.0097, target A$2.6109 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
